The visible state already includes the selected replacement SKU and refund destination, so the grounded next step is to execute the pending-order item modification rather than ask for more catalog details.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode

provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible retail state. Scores prioritize the item-modification action because it is the supported operation that applies both the selected variant and refund handling in one grounded step.
